content:
Part 3 of my Beginner Guide Series:
This time im covering the Covenant System!

https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=MmSB8pNZ4WI

embeds.title: Morimens Covenants In A Nutshell
embeds.description:
In this video im explaining the Morimens Covenant System so Beginners can have a better understanding of it, together we are going over how to get covenants, how to upgrade them and how to start off as an early game player. Hope you enjoy!

-----------------------------------------------------------
